titles.title: There Something That Makes Me Come

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: THERE SOMETHING THAT MAKES ME COME TO YOUR PRESENCE MY SAVIOR (MY HEALER)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: YOU ARE MY SAVIOR MY SAVIOR (MY HEALER)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: YOU ARE MY SAVIOR MY SAVIOR (MY HEALER)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: THERE SOMETHING THAT MAKES ME COME TO YOUR PRESENCE MY SAVIOR (MY HEALER)
